heading: Incontestability
label: 1979 Incontestability
text: Subject to the provision of , insurance coverage granted under this subchapter shall be incontestable from the date of issue, reinstatement, or conversion except for fraud or nonpayment of premium.section 1973 of this title
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “1973” for “773”.Pub. L. 102–83section 779 of this title

Effective DateSection effective first day of third calendar month following May 1974, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1974 Amendment note under .section 12(4) of Pub. L. 93–289section 1968 of this title
